rows.label: tev071501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Min'barac about young Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Min'barac if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0001
rows.name:
We've been able to use the senirapa
water you brought us to steadily
increase our population.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0002
rows.name:
One day, I may also be able to help
birth Mira's third generation of Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Of course, that's only
possible if I survive myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Many of this new generation quickly
ended up being eaten by indigens or
dying in other unfortunate accidents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0005
rows.name:
That is how powerless we truly are. And to those
like myself, who possess no particular talents,
simply surviving is a considerable challenge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0009
rows.name: I was born from Sun'barac.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now I must confront the question of
how to survive on this harsh world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I do not possess the knowledge or technological
prowess of the other Orphe—and of course,
I possess no physical strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0012
rows.name:
At this rate, I would estimate
my odds of dying in the near
future are roughly 96 percent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0013
rows.name:
Perhaps I should seek the counsel of
other powerless xenoforms who have
managed to survive on this world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Min'barac about the way Orphe think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Min'barac about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0014
rows.name:
I used to consider the way BLADEs form
teams based on individual initiative
to be the height of inefficiency.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Surely it would make more sense to have BLADE's
leaders assign members to appropriate teams based
on statistical breakdowns of their abilities?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0016
rows.name:
But now that I see how companions
team up on the basis of personal
compatibility, I finally understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0017
rows.name:
One would much rather put their life in the
hands of a teammate who values them as a
companion, regardless of ability level.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Thank you, [ST:playername ]! Thank you for
all that you've done for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I may have failed to acquire the art of
controlling beasts, but I did manage to
acquire some wonderful companions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Now there's even talk of us all joining
BLADE in order to form a team together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ever since I divided from Sun'barac,
all I've wanted is to find a means
to ensure my survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0026
rows.name:
It's strange, but...now that I have, it feels
as though I've discovered something more
important to life than survival itself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Could this be what you call
"relationships"? They feel somehow
as precious as the Ovah within me.[ST:wait ]
